files.name: 📊 Band Conditions
files.description: Displays current HF band propagation conditions, including solar indices and band-by-band status summaries.

files.name: ☀️ Space Weather History
files.description: Historical charts of space weather data including solar flux, A-index, K-index, and other propagation-relevant metrics over time.

files.name: 🔦 NCDXF/IARU Beacon Tracker
files.description: Tracks and displays the NCDXF/IARU international beacon network, showing which beacons are currently transmitting and on which bands.

files.name: 📡 Band Activity
files.description: Live per-band spectrum display with scrolling waterfall, showing real-time signal activity on each configured HF band.

files.name: 📉 Noise Floor Monitor
files.description: Real-time and historical noise floor monitoring per band, helping identify interference trends and RFI sources.

files.name: 📈 Noise Floor Aggregate Analysis
files.description: Aggregated noise floor analysis across multiple bands and time periods, useful for long-term interference assessment.

files.name: 🌈 Wideband Spectrogram
files.description: Full 0–30 MHz wideband spectrogram viewer showing real-time signal activity across the entire HF spectrum.

files.name: 🕐 Decoder Spots History
files.description: Searchable and filterable history of all digital mode spots decoded by the system, with map and table views.

files.name: 📊 Decoder Spots Analytics
files.description: Analytics and charts for decoded digital spots, showing trends by band, mode, and time of day.

files.name: 📋 Decode Metrics
files.description: Detailed performance metrics for each decoder instance, including decode counts, error rates, and resource usage.

files.name: ⚡ Decode Rates
files.description: Real-time activity charts showing decode rates per band and mode, giving a live view of decoder throughput.

files.name: 🗺️ Digital Spots Map
files.description: Interactive world map plotting decoded digital mode spots, showing propagation paths from decoded callsigns.

files.name: 📡 PSKReporter Analytics
files.description: Analytics dashboard for spots submitted to PSKReporter, showing reception reports and propagation statistics.

files.name: 🗺️ CW Skimmer Map
files.description: Interactive map displaying CW spots from the skimmer, visualising propagation paths to decoded stations.

files.name: 🕐 CW Spots History
files.description: Historical log of CW spots with filtering by callsign, band, and time range, with map and table views.

files.name: 📊 CW Spots Analytics
files.description: Charts and analytics for CW skimmer spots, showing activity trends by band, time, and callsign prefix.

files.name: 📋 CW Metrics
files.description: Performance metrics for the CW skimmer, including decode counts, speed distribution, and band activity.

files.name: 🔄 Rotator Control
files.description: Antenna rotator control interface with compass display, target bearing input, and real-time position feedback.

files.name: 🔀 Antenna Switch Control
files.description: Control panel for managing antenna switch positions, allowing selection between multiple antennas or ports.

files.name: 👥 Session Statistics
files.description: Statistics about active and historical listener sessions, including connection counts, duration, and geographic distribution.

files.name: 📈 Stats History
files.description: Historical charts of system-wide statistics such as listener counts, bandwidth usage, and decode activity over time.

files.name: ⚙️ Admin Configuration
files.description: Full administrative control panel for configuring all aspects of the UberSDR instance, including radio settings, users, decoders, and system options.

files.name: ⬇️ Windows Download
files.description: Download the Desktop Client for Windows (amd64).

files.name: ⬇️ Linux Download
files.description: Download the Desktop Client for Linux (amd64).

files.name: ⬇️ Windows Download
files.description: Download the Minimal Audio client for Windows (amd64).

files.name: ⬇️ Linux Download
files.description: Download the Minimal Audio client for Linux (amd64).

files.name: ⬇️ Windows Download
files.description: Download the IQ Recorder client for Windows (amd64).

files.name: ⬇️ Linux Download
files.description: Download the IQ Recorder client for Linux (amd64).

files.name: 🟡 Chrome Extension
files.description: Install the UberSDR Bridge extension for Google Chrome.

files.name: 🦊 Firefox Extension
files.description: Install the UberSDR Bridge add-on for Mozilla Firefox.

files.name: 🌐 Main Website
files.description: The official UberSDR website with documentation, news, and resources.

files.name: 🔨 Build Your Own
files.description: Guide to building your own UberSDR instance.

files.name: 🌍 Other Instances
files.description: Browse a directory of publicly available UberSDR instances around the world.

files.name: 👂 Smart Listen
files.description: Monitor multiple UberSDR instances simultaneously with Smart Listen.

files.name: 🎲 Spin The Dial
files.description: Randomly tune across UberSDR instances with Spin The Dial.

files.name: 📻 Old Radio Skin
files.description: Alternative retro-styled radio interface skin with skeuomorphic controls, supporting Grundig and UK CB radio themes.
